raw_action_dict.reasoning: State JSON shows all zeros (initialization state), and the image shows a track curving to the left ahead; starting with a gentle left steer to follow the visible curve.
knowledge: Initial state has all-zero values — treat as race start, rely on visual cues.
Track appears to curve left in the first image.
Use small steering corrections to avoid oscillation on straights.
Boundary safety check requires track_width > 0; skip when track_width=0.
Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.
raw_action_dict.waypoint_analysis: No valid waypoint data available (all zeros); using visual cue of left curve — estimated delta ~+15 deg, steer left.
